notes: Reviewed EN batch for void protocols, permits, caravans, and emergency panel definitions.

entries.gt_112551890b85eb: Price: the path grows darker until the term ends.
entries.gt_1b71dafe031d27: Rule: only this room's sign changes, not the whole floor.
entries.gt_1bf07e2c024ef2: BACKLASH: debt struck the health and PSI of nearby creatures.
entries.gt_210d99d5a59b7c: Rule: the passage opens only after obedience, payment, bypass, or explicit hacking.
entries.gt_2a64185567f964: PROTOCOL: the false record crumbled; the real save did not change.
entries.gt_2ce61525025d1b: Price: consuming the source issues a stabilizer and energy cells; ordinary use closes doors and jerks PSI.
entries.gt_37105802e42e1e: Price: the echo calls someone else's memory to the same place.
entries.gt_3fb2db389ba53e: Backlash reason: the zone compensates silence with local fog.
entries.gt_4637002a511c6d: BACKLASH: a Paragraph came out of the extra line.
entries.gt_48193f58f7aee2: PROTOCOL: the silence term expired. Check exits by the map, not by rumor.
entries.gt_50db5fcd74b24d: PROTOCOL: the duty was charged; a Duty Counter came out nearby. Take the spike or passage at once.
entries.gt_52bbff2557d7ea: Backlash reason: impossible memory demands a bearer.
entries.gt_55c47782b19cd5: PROTOCOL: the duty receipt is closed; the debt does not stretch beyond the room.
entries.gt_5db782f504e99a: Rule: green light can be taken only as local room debt.
entries.gt_5f41932c9653d9: Rule: a false record works only as P-46 paper, not as a save.
entries.gt_5f9797c79fcefd: Rule: silence extinguishes room light sources, not the whole samosbor.
entries.gt_61458b0780eee8: Price: the extra line gains the right to leave the floor.
entries.gt_75c3730dac45b6: Price: ammunition, money, reward refusal, or a fight with the counter.
entries.gt_76935305daec60: PROTOCOL: PSI backlash knocked down current nearby targets. They enter PSI frenzy; you pay health.
entries.gt_77d505a4bb9a57: PROTOCOL: the room sign changed its name. Until the term ends, the map will get confused.
entries.gt_7b56a9943af57a: Price: the handle answers with a reverse strike to the hand.
entries.gt_7e023795be55cf: Backlash reason: light was taken without a witness, so debt searches for a body and nearby doors.
entries.gt_83f1da21109949: BACKLASH: an Unperson came to the echo; go around or shoot.
entries.gt_8947fde15724f5: PROTOCOL: the green lamp account is closed. Local mark removed.
entries.gt_9a17f0c633efd5: BACKLASH: reverse clearance jerked the hand and removed health.
entries.gt_9e291e144d2177: BACKLASH: the backlash struck a second time and removed health.
entries.gt_9f3aa2ad018823: PROTOCOL: the old room name is back on the sign.
entries.gt_ab89d65d4fe967: Rule: PSI reset breaks the current nearby target and causes PSI frenzy, while health is charged to the player.
entries.gt_ac0ed8f9b83d02: BACKLASH: fog rose in the corners; visibility is worse by the door.
entries.gt_b03fd402e9748d: Rule: nearest doors change state only around the selected seam.
entries.gt_b5b29483f03e12: BACKLASH: unpaid duty closed the entrance and called the Counter.
entries.gt_b63e4b8fb5a56f: Backlash reason: a document without an owner writes itself a Paragraph.
entries.gt_b97bbfa316f508: Backlash reason: a wrong name jerks the nearest lock.
entries.gt_bada051a2f88fd: PROTOCOL: lamps and candles in the room are out. It is quieter, but the path is harder to see.
entries.gt_bbc36eaf24f155: Price: map and doors read the room as a failure until the term ends.
entries.gt_bdbc27b9ad3bce: Backlash reason: an unpaid line calls a duty counter.
entries.gt_cd18f2f513f96d: PROTOCOL: a resident's double appeared nearby. Keep distance: it is not a guide and does not open doors.
entries.gt_cf4b8d8edc1e68: Backlash reason: discarded aggression returns as a second impulse.
entries.gt_d4c9996b8612fa: BACKLASH: the room jerked the lock; check the door before leaving.
entries.gt_d7a0d7c2cd7a1a: Rule: resident memory can be returned only as an echo, not as a guide.
entries.gt_dacc31b026a87a: Backlash reason: reverse clearance jerks the body used to sign the seam.
entries.gt_e46dcd3794f246: PROTOCOL: the green lamp has been taken on account. Fog rose, nearby doors closed for 12 seconds.
entries.gt_e69b12bef4d192: PROTOCOL: PSI backlash has quieted; targets see the route again.
entries.gt_ef73640c4b2462: PROTOCOL: handles returned to their normal order.
entries.gt_f5bd853164e0e1: PROTOCOL: the echo disappeared; an empty tag remains on the floor.
entries.gt_fd007051b986c7: PROTOCOL: nearby doors changed state. The open one closed; the closed one opened.
entries.gt_fd22209c5b1411: PROTOCOL: two false P-46 records appeared on the floor. Do not show them to the lift.
entries.gt_07ff918c014656: The false pass matched the color of someone else's error.
entries.gt_0a7203be23b6ba: The fake district-council pass was shown as a forgery.
entries.gt_0ef65d5beca024: District council pass accepted: the archive line grew shorter.
entries.gt_32587efe172bcf: Official stub accepted: access issued without an extra record.
entries.gt_37b7eb8ae3a852: Lift order recognized as service access.
entries.gt_3a8ff967cdf54f: The forged stub surfaced in the access log.
entries.gt_3db194a406f4af: The stolen card was turned in as evidence.
entries.gt_430d58cf1c4551: The fake district-council pass went through, but left a crooked shadow in the log.
entries.gt_5dd290de9e0ce9: The forged weapons permit was turned in to the Liquidators.
entries.gt_6326e8caf4cf6c: The forged quarantine clearance went into the sanitary act.
entries.gt_635f19412f7cc2: The forged quarantine clearance passed through a weak shift.
entries.gt_8297f42aae1e4c: The settlement receipt closed the debt and opened a service line.
entries.gt_86fa2c6098dfb2: The debt paper was accepted as a route through the accounting window.
entries.gt_9089eb9cd68128: The seizure warrant forced the safe to recognize the inspection.
entries.gt_a6b697e11d29a8: Quarantine clearance accepted by the sanitary log.
entries.gt_ba01e5d70b1abc: The fake debt paper was turned in before cash-out.
entries.gt_bb6c47adcccd05: The stolen card opened access under someone else's case.
entries.gt_be10eed3bf0aff: The false pass was recorded as grounds for inspection.
entries.gt_d32a9d894bc9d5: The warrant closed someone else's access and raised an audit.
entries.gt_dd928198375b80: The forged weapons permit passed, but left grounds for a search.
entries.gt_e326244d876f79: The fake debt paper worked as someone else's line.
entries.gt_eda6c7ce72fa2c: Archive clearance recognized: the card file gave way.
entries.gt_efc966b5e5c4d4: The forged stub worked, but audit got a line too straight.
